How to play

Unite wands and play special levels to collect candies for the Tricksies.

When the event ends you'll win treats depending on how many Tricksies you've helped.

If you lose, your teammates can help you recover the candies!

Unite wands and play special levels to collect magic drops for the Tricksies. When the event ends you'll win prizes depending on how many Tricksies you've helped. If you lose, your teammates can help you recover the magic drops!
